text: MIST-CF is an extension of MIST for annotating MS1 precursor masses from MS/MS data in a de novo setting.
source_excerpt:
an extension of
[MIST](https://www.nature.com/articles/s42256-023-00708-3) for annotating MS1
precursor masses from MS/MS data in a _de novo_ setting

super_pattern.subject: MIST-CF
super_pattern.relation: is an extension designed for annotating precursor masses
super_pattern.object: MS1 precursor mass annotation from MS/MS data in de novo setting

text: MIST-CF ranks chemical formula and adduct assignments for an unknown mass spectrum using an end-to-end energy based modeling approach.
source_excerpt:
MIST-CF ranks chemical
formula and adduct assignments for an unknown mass spectrum using an end-to-end
energy based modeling approach

super_pattern.subject: MIST-CF
super_pattern.relation: ranks chemical formula and adduct assignments using energy-based modeling

text: MIST-CF adopts a formula transformer neural network architecture.
source_excerpt:
MIST-CF adopts a formula transformer
neural network architecture

super_pattern.subject: MIST-CF
super_pattern.relation: adopts formula transformer neural network architecture

text: MIST-CF utilizes an internal chemical subformula assignment protocol rather than SIRIUS fragmentation trees.
source_excerpt: Utilizing an internal chemical subformula assignment protocol (rather than SIRIUS fragmentation trees)

super_pattern.subject: MIST-CF
super_pattern.relation: utilizes internal chemical subformula assignment instead of SIRIUS fragmentation trees

text: MIST-CF considers multiple adduct types beyond [M+H]+ in positive mode.
source_excerpt: Considering multiple adduct types beyond [M+H]+ (still only positive mode)

super_pattern.subject: MIST-CF
super_pattern.relation: considers multiple adduct types in positive mode
